notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler singles on a line drive to left fielder Carson Benge. Lawrence Butler to 2nd. Lawrence Butler advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Carson Benge.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Denzel Clarke. Carson Benge scores.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to first baseman Mark Vientos. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.
